findings.title: Pair self-transfer via `skim(pair)` appears to inflate SBR balances and enables AMM liquidity theft

best_agent_match.title: Pair self-transfer via `skim(pair)` can mint or duplicate SBR balances

rejected_candidates.title: Manipulated pair balance can be locked in with `sync()` and dumped to drain ETH liquidity
rejected_candidates.reason: Merged into `F-001` as an exploitation step and impact amplifier of the same underlying balance-inflation bug, not a distinct root-cause finding.
